name: uniqBy (from lodash)
description: A source-faithful extracted bundle of lodash's uniqBy method and its required helpers, cut from the full lodash package instead of the standalone lodash.uniqby package.
tagline: Extract lodash uniqBy from the monolith with helpers included.
summary: This page ships an extracted bundle from the full lodash package. The point is not to use the modular lodash.uniqby package, but to prove that iteratee-based collection behavior can be cut from the monolith with its helper chain intact.
nativeAlternative: Set can handle primitive uniqueness, but iteratee-based uniqueness with lodash semantics is more than a trivial one-liner.

variants.label: Normalized
variants.note: Rule-based normalization after extraction. The extraction defines the raw bundle; normalization only changes the packaging shape.

variants.label: Raw
variants.note: Source-faithful extracted bundle from the lodash package, with local helper modules inlined and module boundaries removed.

note: This snippet is a monolith extraction experiment. It differs from the modular lodash.uniqby package because the raw source is assembled from the full lodash package's internal module graph.
